interpretation: Raw ROOT reproduction of the P07c primary shape-only 6500-7500 q_template shift.
All ratio and calibration models train on complete non-held-out runs only.
Primary ML calibration uses normalized waveform shape plus base lift, not raw observed amplitude.
Primary shape-transfer and calibration features omit explicit log ceiling.
Primary ML calibration omits run id.
Linear shrinkage must close the held-out boundary q_template gate.
ML calibration must close the held-out boundary q_template gate.
ML calibration must preserve held-out boundary CFD20 timing.
An observed-amplitude-only calibration should not explain most primary ML lift.
Run/event/amplitude control should not reproduce primary ML correction on held-out runs.
Shuffled calibration target should not reproduce primary ML correction.
A useful gate should not abstain on nearly all A>=7000 pulses.
Traditional linear shrinkage should not collapse to no correction in application.
